overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a science fiction video game showing a character in a white lab coat walking through a futuristic research facility. The character moves from a kitchen preparation area through a large circular airlock into a misty, climate-controlled storage corridor lined with glass-fronted shelving units.

events.description: character walks past the food preparation counter where an NPC is working

stainless steel appliances and cooking stations
tall metal shelving units with storage containers
large circular metallic airlock door with mechanical locking mechanisms

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a clean, well-lit kitchen area of a research facility. A worker in blue stands at a preparation counter to the right. The character moves past kitchen equipment and metal shelving toward a large circular airlock door at the far end of the room.

events.description: character enters and passes through the circular airlock door into the storage corridor

agents.ego_description: walking through the heavy circular airlock door, transitioning from kitchen to storage area

entered.detail: the metallic threshold and sealing mechanism of the airlock door

segments.scene_description: The character approaches and passes through the large circular airlock door, leaving the kitchen behind. The heavy mechanical door dominates the frame as the character steps across the threshold into a narrower corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: climate-controlled storage corridor with cryogenic preservation

events.description: thick cryogenic mist or steam fills the corridor as character enters the climate-controlled storage section
character continues walking deeper into the misty corridor approaching another door at the far end

agents.ego_description: walking through the misty storage corridor, examining the glass-fronted storage lockers lining both sides

entered.detail: tall glass-fronted shelving units with blue interior lighting containing boxes and containers
tall glass-fronted shelving units with blue interior lighting containing boxes and containers
thick white fog or steam filling the corridor, creating a hazy atmosphere
another circular door visible at the far end of the corridor through the mist

segments.scene_description: The character enters a long, narrow storage corridor filled with cryogenic mist. Glass-fronted lockers line both sides, illuminated with cool blue light. The character walks through the thick fog toward another circular door visible at the far end of the corridor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a brightly lit kitchen area into a cold, mist-filled cryogenic storage corridor. It begins by following a character in a white lab coat through a clean research facility kitchen, passing a worker at a preparation counter and metal shelving. As the character advances, the scene shifts toward a massive circular airlock door that dominates the frame before the camera crosses the threshold. The environment then transforms into a narrow corridor engulfed in thick cryogenic mist, where the warm lighting is replaced by cool blue glows emanating from glass-fronted lockers. The camera continues its forward momentum through the fog, finally heading toward another circular door visible at the far end of the hall.
